description_long: This is a classic American muscle coupe car with a sleek, elongated body and a low, aggressive stance. The exterior is finished in a dark gray or black color with bold gold racing stripes running from the hood to the trunk, giving it a sporty and vintage appearance. The car features two doors, prominent wheel arches, and period-correct alloy wheels with visible tire branding. Chrome accents are present on the bumpers, side mirrors, and window trims, enhancing its retro aesthetic. The roofline is a fastback style, smoothly sloping from the windshield to the rear, and the side windows are framed, typical of late 1960s performance coupes. The interior, though not fully visible, likely includes leather or vinyl seating, a classic dashboard, and metallic trim elements.
description: A vintage muscle coupe car with dark gray paint, gold racing stripes, and a fastback roofline, featuring chrome accents and two doors.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the dual gold stripes across the trunk, chrome bumper, and taillights.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the fastback roofline, two doors, and gold stripes along the hood and roof.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the gold stripes on the hood, classic grille, and chrome bumper details.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, with visible door, side mirror, and fastback silhouette.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
